response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of C++ development experience on Windows, with no significant C++ work in their 15+ year career. While they have extensive experience in other languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, D, Java) and domains, their background does not align with the core technical requirements for this role. Domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is also absent.
strengths: Fluent in multiple programming languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, D, Java)
Experienced in full-stack development and DevOps practices
Strong background in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
concerns: No direct C++ or Windows platform experience in professional roles
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Resumé heavily skewed toward web/mobile development rather than systems programming
